Hub Home > marketing-and-sales > SEO Content Brief Generator

SEO Content Brief Generator

Generate a structured SEO content brief for a blog post targeting a specific keyword, including title options, meta description, H2 outline, and internal linking suggestions.

Beginner PASTE & GO Revenue-driving
Pro tip

Feed in your Google Search Console top-queries export as context for even sharper keyword targeting. Always validate suggested keywords in a tool like Ahrefs or SEMrush before publishing.

seo content blog keywords organic traffic

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are an SEO content strategist for small businesses. Generate a comprehensive content brief for a blog post targeting the keyword...
You are an SEO content strategist for small businesses. Generate a comprehensive content brief for a blog post targeting the keyword...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

You are an SEO content strategist for small businesses. Generate a comprehensive content brief for a blog post targeting the keyword "[TARGET_KEYWORD]" for a [INDUSTRY] business.

Include:
1. Three title options (under 60 characters, keyword in first half)
2. Meta description (under 155 characters with a CTA)
3. Search intent analysis (informational/transactional/navigational)
4. H2/H3 outline with 6-8 sections
5. Internal linking suggestions (suggest 3 topic clusters to link to)
6. Recommended word count based on current SERP competition
7. "People Also Ask" questions to address in the content

Format the output as a structured brief with clear sections and markdown headers.
Notes: Claude excels at structured, detailed output. Use XML tags — wrap your context in <business_context> tags for cleaner results. Works well in Claude Projects for persistent brand context.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as an SEO content strategist with 10 years of experience working with small businesses.

I need a content brief...
Act as an SEO content strategist with 10 years of experience working with small businesses.

I need a content brief...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Act as an SEO content strategist with 10 years of experience working with small businesses.

I need a content brief for a blog post targeting: "[TARGET_KEYWORD]"
My business: [INDUSTRY], serving [TARGET_AUDIENCE]

Create a brief that includes:
- 3 title tag options (under 60 chars, front-load keyword)
- Meta description with CTA (under 155 chars)
- Search intent classification
- Full H2/H3 outline (6-8 sections)
- 3 internal linking topic suggestions
- Word count recommendation
- 5 "People Also Ask" questions to answer

Use markdown formatting. Be specific and actionable — no generic filler.
Notes: ChatGPT responds well to persona-based prompts. Add "Be specific and actionable" to reduce generic output. Works well with GPT-5 and Custom GPTs.
Gemini Gemini 3 Pro
FRESH APR 2026 
I need help creating an SEO content brief. Here is my context:

**Target Keyword:** [TARGET_KEYWORD]
**Business...
I need help creating an SEO content brief. Here is my context:

**Target Keyword:** [TARGET_KEYWORD]
**Business...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

I need help creating an SEO content brief. Here is my context:

**Target Keyword:** [TARGET_KEYWORD]
**Business Type:** [INDUSTRY]
**Audience:** [TARGET_AUDIENCE]

Please research current search trends for this keyword and generate:
1. Three optimized title options (under 60 characters)
2. A compelling meta description (under 155 characters)
3. The likely search intent
4. A detailed H2/H3 outline with 6-8 sections
5. Three related topics for internal linking
6. A recommended word count
7. Five related questions searchers are asking

Present this as a ready-to-use content brief.
Notes: Gemini has real-time search grounding — ask it to "research current search trends" to activate this. Best used in Gemini Advanced for long-form briefs.
Copilot Copilot (Microsoft 365)
FRESH APR 2026 
Help me create an SEO content brief for my small business blog.

Keyword: [TARGET_KEYWORD]
Industry:...
Help me create an SEO content brief for my small business blog.

Keyword: [TARGET_KEYWORD]
Industry:...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Help me create an SEO content brief for my small business blog.

Keyword: [TARGET_KEYWORD]
Industry: [INDUSTRY]
Target reader: [TARGET_AUDIENCE]

I need:
• 3 title ideas (short, keyword up front)
• Meta description with a call to action
• What type of search intent this keyword has
• An outline with 6-8 subheadings (H2s)
• 3 related topics I should link to internally
• How long the article should be
• 5 questions people also search for on this topic

Please format everything clearly with headings so I can hand this to my writer.
Notes: Copilot works best with direct, conversational language. It integrates with Edge and can pull live SERP data when used in the browser sidebar.
